title: centaurea sandorii
intro: Centaurea sandorii, also known as Qinpi or Sandor's knapweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Centaurea sandorii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to treat various ailments.
